seeds.value: Define your product roadmap here. Example: Q1: Improve onboarding flow. Q2: Launch enterprise tier. Q3: Self-serve analytics. Q4: Mobile app.
seeds.description: Current product roadmap — used to prioritize feature requests against strategic goals

seeds.value: Create a gh_issues record when a feature request has 3+ independent customer signals and aligns with the current quarter's roadmap priorities.
seeds.description: Threshold for when to create a GitHub issue spec
